_meta.purpose: Stool intestinal protozoa (cysts / trophozoites / oocysts) -> disease. Keys are YOLO class names (snake_case) from the protozoa detector. The vision service resolves each detected organism to its disease + significance. Decision support only; a microscopist validates (wet prep / trichrome / modified acid-fast).
_meta.source: CDC DPDx + WHO intestinal protozoa references. Curated for JORINOVA NEXUS.

entamoeba_histolytica.name: Entamoeba histolytica cyst/trophozoite
entamoeba_histolytica.note: Amoebic dysentery; can cause LIVER ABSCESS. Ingested RBCs in trophozoite = invasive. Distinguish from non-pathogenic E. dispar/moshkovskii. Treat: metronidazole + luminal agent.

entamoeba_dispar.name: Entamoeba dispar/moshkovskii
entamoeba_dispar.note: Morphologically identical to E. histolytica — do NOT treat unless histolytica confirmed (antigen/PCR).

entamoeba_coli.name: Entamoeba coli cyst/trophozoite
entamoeba_coli.note: Marker of faecal-oral exposure; ≥5 nuclei in mature cyst.

giardia_lamblia.name: Giardia lamblia cyst/trophozoite
giardia_lamblia.note: Malabsorption, chronic/foul diarrhoea. 'Falling-leaf' motility; face-like trophozoite. Treat: metronidazole/tinidazole.

cryptosporidium.name: Cryptosporidium oocyst
cryptosporidium.note: Modified acid-fast oocysts (4-6 µm). Severe/chronic diarrhoea in HIV/immunocompromised — can be life-threatening. Notifiable in many settings.

cyclospora.name: Cyclospora cayetanensis oocyst
cyclospora.note: Acid-fast, 8-10 µm, autofluorescent. Prolonged watery diarrhoea. Treat: co-trimoxazole.

cystoisospora.name: Cystoisospora belli oocyst
cystoisospora.note: Elongated oocyst; chronic diarrhoea in immunocompromised. Treat: co-trimoxazole.

blastocystis.name: Blastocystis hominis
blastocystis.note: Central-body forms; significance debated — treat if symptomatic and other causes excluded.

balantidium_coli.name: Balantidium coli cyst/trophozoite
balantidium_coli.note: Largest human protozoan; ciliated. May cause colonic ulceration. Treat: tetracycline/metronidazole.

dientamoeba_fragilis.name: Dientamoeba fragilis trophozoite
dientamoeba_fragilis.note: Binucleate trophozoite (no cyst); permanent stain needed. Chronic GI symptoms.

entamoeba_hartmanni.name: Entamoeba hartmanni cyst/trophozoite
entamoeba_hartmanni.note: Small race (<10 µm) — distinguish from E. histolytica/dispar by size measurement.

entamoeba_polecki.name: Entamoeba polecki cyst/trophozoite
entamoeba_polecki.note: Single large nucleus; often pig/primate contact.

pentatrichomonas_hominis.name: Pentatrichomonas hominis trophozoite
pentatrichomonas_hominis.note: No cyst stage; undulating membrane runs the full body length.

sarcocystis.name: Sarcocystis spp. sporocyst/oocyst
sarcocystis.note: From undercooked beef/pork; passed as sporocysts in stool. Usually self-limiting.
